headline: Parnassus Exit Prompts Fresh Look At Pool Valuation And Demand Risks
summary: Parnassus Mid Cap Fund has exited its position in Pool Corporation (NasdaqGS:POOL). The fund cited weak end market demand and concerns about valuation versus growth outlook as key reasons. Pool Corporation, which supplies swimming pool and outdoor living products, sits at the intersection of residential spending and discretionary projects. Reports of sluggish end market demand highlight how sensitive its business can be to changes in homeowner budgets and construction activity. For...
